title.rendered: LounGenie Features | ORDER, STASH, CHARGE, CHILL

content.rendered:
Feature overview

Three tiers, one premium standard for poolside service.

LounGenie scales from premium convenience to full ordering support while keeping the guest journey polished and the operational path clear for staff.

Talk through your seating mix
See installations

Tier options

Choose the level of service support that fits your property.

All tiers are cumulative: start with guest convenience at the seat, add structured service signaling, then add QR ordering when your priority shifts to faster in-seat order capture.

Classic

Best when your immediate goal is making premium seats feel complete and self-contained for guests.

  • Waterproof safe with waterproof keypad
  • Solar USB charging ports
  • Removable ice bucket
  • Commercial-grade aluminum interior

Service+

Best when your team needs cleaner handling of non-order service requests during busy premium seating periods.

  • Everything in Classic
  • Service call button
  • Alert routed to separate staff service monitor
  • Cleaner request handling for busy premium zones

2.0

Best when you are ready for QR ordering at the seat while still keeping service alerts in a separate workflow.

  • Everything in Service+
  • QR ordering added at the seat
  • Orders print on a dedicated PoolSafe printer
  • Service call button remains active for general requests

How ordering works

The ordering path is clear by design.

  1. Guest scans the QR code from the seat.
  2. The order prints on a dedicated PoolSafe printer.
  3. Staff fulfills the request through the existing service flow.
  4. General service requests still route through the separate service monitor.

This keeps food and beverage communication separate from service alerts and avoids muddled request handling during peak hours.

Ordering does not depend on POS integration. The dedicated printer path is intentional so properties can adopt in-seat ordering without rebuilding existing point-of-sale infrastructure.

Program strengths

Build quality

  • Solid aluminum interior
  • Corrosion-resistant construction
  • Built for high-use hospitality environments
  • Clean visual presentation inside premium seating

Customization

  • Color-matched to property aesthetic
  • Brand logos available on units
  • Advertising surfaces available
  • Configurable across cabanas, daybeds, and premium lounges

Support model

  • PoolSafe installs and services the units
  • Teams receive rollout support
  • The program is built for operational practicality
  • Designed to fit premium hospitality pacing

Choosing a tier

A practical way to decide where to start

Start with Classic when

  • You want a cleaner premium guest setup immediately.
  • Your first priority is in-seat convenience and presentation.
  • You plan to evaluate service-flow upgrades in a later phase.

Choose Service+ when

  • Your team needs clearer handling of in-seat service requests.
  • Premium areas are busy enough that request flow can get noisy.
  • You want better staff visibility before adding seat-level ordering.

Move to 2.0 when

  • You are ready for QR ordering directly from the seat.
  • You want order intent captured without adding guest friction.
  • You still need separate service alerts for non-order requests.

Closer product views

Discuss your rollout

title.rendered: LounGenie | Smart Poolside Revenue & Guest Experience Platform

content.rendered:
Smart premium seating for hospitality

Make premium seating feel effortless for guests and more valuable for operators.

LounGenie brings ordering, secure storage, charging, and comfort directly into the seat so premium zones can reduce service friction, keep guests in place longer, and run with clearer staff workflows.

Request a Demo
Explore Features
  • ORDER, STASH, CHARGE, and CHILL integrated at the seat
  • QR orders print on a dedicated PoolSafe printer
  • Service alerts route separately to a staff monitor
  • PoolSafe handles installation and ongoing service support

Selected property logos

Built for premium seating

Designed for the seat types guests actually book first.

LounGenie is meant to live inside the highest-value seating on the deck, where convenience, presentation, and service quality need to feel integrated from the first impression onward.

Cabanas

Private rental cabanas where premium dwell time depends on guests feeling fully taken care of without leaving the space to chase service, power, or secure storage.

Daybeds

Premium daybed zones that need to feel polished and complete, with the convenience layer built into the seat instead of introduced as visible clutter.

Clamshells

Reserved loungers and covered seating where seat-level ordering, storage, and charging help transform a simple reservation into a more premium-feeling experience.

Premium lounge zones

High-traffic premium seating areas where faster response, cleaner service communication, and a more self-contained guest setup can protect both satisfaction and spend.

Why premium seating performs better with LounGenie

The product is designed to remove guest friction without making the seating area feel more complicated or less premium.

ORDER

Guests scan and order from the seat. Orders print on a dedicated PoolSafe printer so the service flow stays clear.

STASH

The waterproof safe and keypad help guests relax and stay longer in high-value seating areas.

CHARGE + CHILL

Solar USB charging ports and a removable ice bucket round out the premium seat experience.

What operators are solving

Premium seating performs best when common friction points are handled at the seat.

Keeps guests in the premium zone

Ordering, secure storage, charging, and CHILL are integrated into the seat so guests do not need to leave their reserved area to solve basic needs.

Separates service and ordering clearly

QR orders print on a dedicated PoolSafe printer while general service requests route to a separate staff monitor, reducing mixed signals during peak windows.

Maintains premium presentation

The unit is designed to sit naturally within cabanas, daybeds, and reserved lounges without making the seating area feel crowded or improvised.

Guest journey

What changes once a guest sits down?

  • Valuables go into a waterproof safe instead of being left exposed.
  • Phones remain powered without guests leaving the seating zone.
  • Service requests stay organized through a separate staff monitor workflow.
  • QR ordering creates a cleaner path from intent to completed order.
See more installations

Real deployment imagery

Operator FAQ

Common questions before rollout

How do orders and service requests stay separate?

QR orders print on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. General service requests go to a separate staff touchscreen monitor, so teams can manage both flows clearly.

Does 2.0 remove the service call button?

No. 2.0 adds QR ordering on top of Service+, and the service call button remains active for non-order requests.

What is usually the best starting tier?

Most teams start with the bottleneck they need to solve first: guest convenience at the seat, service workflow clarity, or in-seat order capture.

How is rollout handled operationally?

PoolSafe handles installation, service, and ongoing support. Property teams stay focused on guest operations while rollout is coordinated around seasonal timing.

PoolSafe installs it, services it, and supports the rollout.

The commercial model is designed to reduce adoption friction while keeping the guest experience premium from day one.

Talk with the team

excerpt.rendered: LounGenie helps hotels, resorts, and waterparks increase poolside revenue with QR ordering, secure storage, charging, and premium guest seating amenities.

title.rendered: About LounGenie | Hospitality Technology for Premium Seating

content.rendered:
About the platform

Built for the way premium guests actually behave poolside.

LounGenie is built by PoolSafe to help operators modernize premium seating without turning the product into a service burden for the property team.

Built by PoolSafe

Designed to belong inside premium seating, not beside it.

LounGenie is designed and built in Canada by PoolSafe for hospitality teams that care about visual quality, reliable operation, and a cleaner seat-level guest journey.

Every feature is meant to earn its place in the cabana. The product has to look right, function clearly, and support the revenue logic of premium seating.

  • Commercial-grade construction
  • Color and branding flexibility
  • Installation and service handled by PoolSafe
  • Designed for premium seating environments

What makes it different

The platform is engineered around visual fit and operational clarity.

Commercial construction

Solid aluminum interior and corrosion-resistant materials are used to handle demanding outdoor hospitality use.

Service-centered workflow

General service requests route separately from printed QR orders so staff interaction remains easier to manage at busy properties.

Brand flexibility

Units can be matched to property colors and support logo or branded-advertising treatments.

Why hospitality teams evaluate it now

Premium seating programs are expected to deliver more than a reserved chair or cabana. Guests expect secure storage, charging, fast service access, and a polished environment that still feels relaxed.

Operators evaluate LounGenie when they want those expectations handled at the seat itself, while preserving a workflow staff can actually manage during peak demand.

The goal is not to add more complexity to premium zones. The goal is to remove repeated guest and staff friction points while keeping the seating area visually on-brand.

Common evaluation questions

  • Does it fit the visual standard of the property?
  • Will it reduce common guest friction at the seat?
  • Can staff manage ordering and service signals without confusion?
  • Can the rollout be timed around the busy season?

Deployment and presentation

IAAPA Brass Ring Award recognition reflects the product focus on practical innovation and guest-facing hospitality value.

Talk with our team

excerpt.rendered: Learn how LounGenie combines guest convenience and operator revenue performance in one commercial-grade hospitality product.

title.rendered: Contact LounGenie | Request a Poolside Revenue Demo

content.rendered:
Contact LounGenie

Start the conversation before peak season.

Tell us about your property and we will map a practical rollout plan around your seating mix, brand goals, and deployment timing.

Email the team
Review features first

Reach out today

Email: info@poolsafeinc.com
Phone: +1 (416) 630-2444
Address: 906 Magnetic Drive, North York, ON M3J 2C4, Canada

What to have ready

  • Your property type and premium seating mix (cabana, daybed, clamshell, lounge).
  • Your rollout timing and the season you are planning around.
  • Your current priority: guest convenience, service workflow clarity, or in-seat order capture.
  • Any branding, color, or placement constraints we should account for.

If you are unsure which tier fits, that is normal. The first call is designed to map your priorities to Classic, Service+, or 2.0 in a practical sequence.

Real deployment imagery from an active premium seating environment.

Best fit: cabanas, daybeds, clamshells, and reserved premium seating where guest spend and dwell time matter most.

Who usually reaches out

Resorts and hotels

Teams looking to improve the value and completeness of reserved cabanas, daybeds, and poolside VIP seating.

Waterparks and attractions

Operators that need premium zones to stay organized and guest-friendly even when surrounding traffic is heavier and faster paced.

Owners and development teams

Groups evaluating how branded premium seating can look more finished at launch or during a broader amenity refresh.

The process

A rollout conversation built around real operating constraints.

1. Property review

We review seat count, venue type, and the operational rhythm of the premium seating area.

2. Rollout mapping

We align tier choice, branding, placement, and deployment timing with your property goals.

3. Installation and launch

PoolSafe handles installation and support so the property team can stay focused on operations.

What we plan together

  • Seat mix and density across cabanas, daybeds, or premium lounges
  • Branding treatments and color matching
  • Operational fit between Classic, Service+, and 2.0
  • Installation timing before your busiest traffic period

The goal is a rollout that looks intentional, feels premium, and makes sense for how your team actually serves guests.

The commercial model is structured with $0 upfront and a revenue-share approach, so teams can evaluate fit and timing without a heavy initial capital hurdle.

Email the team
Review features

Deployment inspiration
